critical_action_items: Fix 404 errors for legacy tool URLs
Investigate redirect loops for blog and all-tools pages
Monitor 'Discovered - currently not indexed' pages after sitemap update

issues.analysis: Legacy URLs from previous folder structure (/tools/*).
Likely caused by trailing slash mismatches or HTTP/HTTPS loops. Confirmed canonical setup is correct.
issues.recommendation: Monitor after specific 404 fixes; verify host-level redirect rules.

issues.analysis: Google found these pages (likely from sitemap) but hasn't crawled them yet. This is normal for new/updated content.
issues.recommendation: Ensure sitemap is submitted (Done) and improve internal linking (Done via Footer/Related Tools).
